SELECT "treatment", 
       MAX("G") AS max_dissolution_rate, 
       "OmegaAragonite"
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "G" = (SELECT MAX("G") 
             FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus" AS sub
             WHERE sub."treatment" = "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"."treatment")
GROUP BY "treatment", "OmegaAragonite"
ORDER BY "treatment"

WITH max_dissolution AS (
  SELECT 
    "treatment",
    MAX(-"G") AS max_neg_G
  FROM 
    "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE 
    "treatment" IN ('shell.trossulus', 'shell.californianus')
  GROUP BY 
    "treatment"
)
SELECT 
  trossulus.max_neg_G / californianus.max_neg_G AS factor_exceed
FROM 
  max_dissolution trossulus
JOIN 
  max_dissolution californianus
ON 
  trossulus."treatment" = 'shell.trossulus' 
  AND californianus."treatment" = 'shell.californianus'

SELECT "treatment",
       COUNT("shell.number") AS shell_count,
       AVG(-"G") AS mean_dissolution_rate,
       STDDEV_SAMP(-"G") AS stddev_dissolution_rate
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1
GROUP BY "treatment"
ORDER BY "treatment"

WITH species_dissolution AS (
  SELECT 
    CASE 
      WHEN "treatment" LIKE 'shell.trossulus%' THEN 'trossulus'
      WHEN "treatment" LIKE 'shell.californianus%' THEN 'californianus'
    END AS species,
    "treatment",
    "G"
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1
),
mean_dissolution AS (
  SELECT 
    species,
    CASE 
      WHEN "treatment" NOT LIKE '%.painted' THEN 'unsealed'
      ELSE 'sealed'
    END AS seal_status,
    AVG("G") AS mean_dissolution_rate
  FROM species_dissolution
  GROUP BY species, seal_status
)
SELECT 
  species,
  (unsealed.mean_dissolution_rate - sealed.mean_dissolution_rate) AS dissolution_rate_difference
FROM 
  (SELECT species, mean_dissolution_rate FROM mean_dissolution WHERE seal_status = 'unsealed') AS unsealed
JOIN 
  (SELECT species, mean_dissolution_rate FROM mean_dissolution WHERE seal_status = 'sealed') AS sealed
ON unsealed.species = sealed.species

WITH mean_weights AS (
  SELECT 
    CASE 
      WHEN "treatment" LIKE 'shell.californianus%' THEN 'M. californianus'
      WHEN "treatment" LIKE 'shell.trossulus%' THEN 'M. trossulus'
    END AS species,
    avg("shell.wt") AS mean_weight
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  GROUP BY species
)
SELECT 
  (SELECT mean_weight FROM mean_weights WHERE species = 'M. californianus') /
  (SELECT mean_weight FROM mean_weights WHERE species = 'M. trossulus') AS weight_ratio

SELECT "treatment", 
       regr_slope("G", "OmegaAragonite") AS slope, 
       corr("G", "OmegaAragonite") AS pearson_r
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
GROUP BY "treatment"

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN "treatment" LIKE 'shell.trossulus%' THEN 'trossulus'
        WHEN "treatment" LIKE 'shell.californianus%' THEN 'californianus'
    END AS species,
    CASE 
        WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%.painted' THEN 'sealed'
        ELSE 'unsealed'
    END AS sealing,
    COUNT(*) AS number_of_shells,
    ROUND(AVG(-"G")::numeric, 3) AS mean_dissolution_rate
FROM 
    "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE 
    "OmegaAragonite" < 1
GROUP BY 
    species, sealing

SELECT "treatment", 
       ROUND(AVG("shell.wt")::numeric, 3) AS mean_shell_weight, 
       ROUND(STDDEV_SAMP("shell.wt")::numeric, 3) AS sd_shell_weight
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
GROUP BY "treatment"

SELECT "treatment",
       -AVG("G") AS mean_dissolution_rate,
       1.96 * STDDEV_SAMP("G") / SQRT(COUNT(*)) AS ci_half_width
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1
GROUP BY "treatment"

WITH trossulus AS (
  SELECT -"G" AS dissolution_rate
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus' AND "OmegaAragonite" < 1
),
californianus AS (
  SELECT -"G" AS dissolution_rate
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.californianus' AND "OmegaAragonite" < 1
),
t_stats AS (
  SELECT AVG(dissolution_rate) AS mean, STDDEV_SAMP(dissolution_rate) AS stddev, COUNT(*) AS n
  FROM trossulus
),
c_stats AS (
  SELECT AVG(dissolution_rate) AS mean, STDDEV_SAMP(dissolution_rate) AS stddev, COUNT(*) AS n
  FROM californianus
)
SELECT 
  (t_stats.mean - c_stats.mean) / 
  SQRT(((t_stats.n - 1) * t_stats.stddev * t_stats.stddev + (c_stats.n - 1) * c_stats.stddev * c_stats.stddev) / 
  NULLIF(t_stats.n + c_stats.n - 2, 0)) AS cohens_d
FROM t_stats, c_stats

WITH trossulus AS (
  SELECT avg(-"G") AS m, var_samp(-"G") AS v, count(*) AS n
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus' AND "OmegaAragonite" < 1
),
californianus AS (
  SELECT avg(-"G") AS m, var_samp(-"G") AS v, count(*) AS n
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.californianus' AND "OmegaAragonite" < 1
)
SELECT round(((trossulus.m - californianus.m) / sqrt(trossulus.v / trossulus.n + californianus.v / californianus.n))::numeric, 3) AS welch_t
FROM trossulus CROSS JOIN californianus

WITH unsealed AS (
  SELECT "G" AS dissolution_rate
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus' AND "OmegaAragonite" < 1
),
sealed AS (
  SELECT "G" AS dissolution_rate
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus.painted' AND "OmegaAragonite" < 1
),
unsealed_stats AS (
  SELECT AVG(dissolution_rate) AS mean, STDDEV_SAMP(dissolution_rate) AS stddev, COUNT(*) AS n
  FROM unsealed
),
sealed_stats AS (
  SELECT AVG(dissolution_rate) AS mean, STDDEV_SAMP(dissolution_rate) AS stddev, COUNT(*) AS n
  FROM sealed
)
SELECT 
  (unsealed_stats.mean - sealed_stats.mean) / 
  SQRT(((unsealed_stats.n - 1) * unsealed_stats.stddev * unsealed_stats.stddev + 
        (sealed_stats.n - 1) * sealed_stats.stddev * sealed_stats.stddev) / 
       NULLIF(unsealed_stats.n + sealed_stats.n - 2, 0)) AS cohens_d
FROM unsealed_stats, sealed_stats

WITH g AS (
  SELECT 
    CASE 
      WHEN "treatment" = 'shell.californianus' THEN 'unsealed' 
      WHEN "treatment" = 'shell.californianus.painted' THEN 'sealed' 
    END AS grp, 
    -"G" AS dissolution_rate
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1
    AND "treatment" IN ('shell.californianus', 'shell.californianus.painted')
),
s AS (
  SELECT 
    avg(dissolution_rate) FILTER (WHERE grp = 'unsealed') AS mu,
    var_samp(dissolution_rate) FILTER (WHERE grp = 'unsealed') AS vu,
    count(*) FILTER (WHERE grp = 'unsealed') AS nu,
    avg(dissolution_rate) FILTER (WHERE grp = 'sealed') AS ms,
    var_samp(dissolution_rate) FILTER (WHERE grp = 'sealed') AS vs,
    count(*) FILTER (WHERE grp = 'sealed') AS ns
  FROM g
)
SELECT 
  round(((mu - ms) / sqrt(vu / nu + vs / ns))::numeric, 3) AS welch_t
FROM s

SELECT "treatment",
       percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY -"G") AS median_dissolution_rate
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
GROUP BY "treatment"
ORDER BY "treatment"

WITH mean_dissolution AS (
  SELECT 
    "treatment",
    AVG(-"G") AS mean_dissolution_rate
  FROM 
    "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE 
    "OmegaAragonite" < 1 AND 
    "treatment" IN ('shell.trossulus', 'shell.californianus')
  GROUP BY 
    "treatment"
)
SELECT 
  (SELECT mean_dissolution_rate FROM mean_dissolution WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus') /
  (SELECT mean_dissolution_rate FROM mean_dissolution WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.californianus') AS ratio_of_mean_dissolution_rate

SELECT width_bucket("OmegaAragonite", 0, 10, 5) AS bin,
       count(*) AS n,
       min("OmegaAragonite") AS lo,
       max("OmegaAragonite") AS hi
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

WITH stats AS (
    SELECT 
        "treatment",
        AVG("G") AS mean_G,
        STDDEV("G") AS sd_G
    FROM 
        "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
    GROUP BY 
        "treatment"
),
z_scores AS (
    SELECT 
        "shell.number",
        "treatment",
        "G",
        ("G" - s.mean_G) / s.sd_G AS z_score
    FROM 
        "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus" AS a
    JOIN 
        stats AS s
    ON 
        a."treatment" = s."treatment"
)
SELECT 
    "shell.number",
    "treatment",
    "G",
    z_score
FROM 
    z_scores
ORDER BY 
    ABS(z_score) DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT "shell.number", "OmegaAragonite", "G",
       AVG("G") OVER (ORDER BY "OmegaAragonite" ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS moving_avg_G
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus'
ORDER BY "OmegaAragonite"

WITH ranked_shells AS (
    SELECT 
        "shell.number",
        "treatment",
        "G",
        percent_rank() OVER (PARTITION BY "treatment" ORDER BY "G") AS pct_rank
    FROM 
        "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
)
SELECT 
    "shell.number",
    "treatment",
    "G",
    pct_rank
FROM 
    ranked_shells
ORDER BY 
    pct_rank DESC
LIMIT 5

WITH st AS (
  SELECT avg(-"G") AS mu, stddev_pop(-"G") AS sd, count(*) AS n
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "G" IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT round((sum(power(((-"G") - st.mu) / nullif(st.sd, 0), 3)) / st.n)::numeric, 4) AS skewness
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus", st
WHERE "G" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY st.n

SELECT COUNT(*) AS unsealed_trossulus_count
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus'
  AND "G" > (
    SELECT MAX("G")
    FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
    WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.californianus'
  )

WITH d AS (
  SELECT "treatment" AS group, -"G" AS y
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1
),
gm AS (
  SELECT AVG(y) AS grand_mean, COUNT(*) AS total_n, COUNT(DISTINCT group) AS k
  FROM d
),
grp AS (
  SELECT group, AVG(y) AS group_mean, VAR_SAMP(y) AS group_var, COUNT(*) AS n
  FROM d
  GROUP BY group
)
SELECT ROUND(
  (
    SUM(grp.n * POWER(grp.group_mean - gm.grand_mean, 2)) / (gm.k - 1)
  ) /
  (
    SUM((grp.n - 1) * grp.group_var) / (gm.total_n - gm.k)
  )::numeric, 3
) AS anova_f,
(gm.k - 1) AS df_between,
(gm.total_n - gm.k) AS df_within
FROM grp, gm

SELECT regr_slope(ln(-"G"), "OmegaAragonite") AS omega_coefficient,
       sqrt(regr_sxx("OmegaAragonite") / regr_count(ln(-"G"), "OmegaAragonite")) AS standard_error,
       regr_slope(ln(-"G"), "OmegaAragonite") / sqrt(regr_sxx("OmegaAragonite") / regr_count(ln(-"G"), "OmegaAragonite")) AS t_statistic,
       regr_count(ln(-"G"), "OmegaAragonite") AS n
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1 AND "G" < 0

SELECT 
    regr_intercept(log("G" - "OmegaAragonite"), "treatment") AS intercept,
    regr_slope(log("G" - "OmegaAragonite"), CASE WHEN "treatment" LIKE 'shell.trossulus%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS species_coefficient,
    regr_slope(log("G" - "OmegaAragonite"), CASE WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%.painted' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS sealing_coefficient,
    regr_slope(log("G" - "OmegaAragonite"), 
               CASE WHEN "treatment" LIKE 'shell.trossulus%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END * 
               CASE WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%.painted' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS interaction_coefficient
FROM 
    "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE 
    "OmegaAragonite" < 1 AND "G" < 0

SELECT "treatment",
       count("shell.length") AS num_shells,
       round(avg("shell.length")::numeric, 2) AS mean_length,
       round(stddev_samp("shell.length")::numeric, 2) AS sd_length
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "shell.length" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY "treatment"

SELECT "treatment", 
       avg("duration") AS mean_duration, 
       stddev_samp("duration") AS sd_duration
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
GROUP BY "treatment"
ORDER BY "treatment"

SELECT COUNT(*) AS n_shells, 
       AVG("G") AS mean_G, 
       AVG("G") - 1.96 * STDDEV_SAMP("G") / SQRT(COUNT(*)) AS ci95_low, 
       AVG("G") + 1.96 * STDDEV_SAMP("G") / SQRT(COUNT(*)) AS ci95_high 
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus" 
WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.californianus' AND "OmegaAragonite" > 1
SELECT MIN("Irrigation_times") AS min_irrigation, MAX("Irrigation_times") AS max_irrigation FROM "2023_crop_data"

WITH height_data AS (
  SELECT "Crop",
         unnest(array[50, 60, 70, 80, 90, 100, 110, 120, 130, 140]) AS days,
         unnest(array["Average_height_50", "Average_height_60", "Average_height_70", "Average_height_80", "Average_height_90", 
                      "Average_height_100", "Average_height_110", "Average_height_120", "Average_height_130", "Average_height_140"]) AS height
  FROM "2023_crop_data"
  WHERE "Crop" IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT "Crop",
       regr_slope(height, days) AS slope,
       regr_count(height, days) AS n_observations
FROM height_data
GROUP BY "Crop"
ORDER BY "Crop"

SELECT "Crop", "Site", AVG("Survival") AS mean_survival, COUNT(*) AS plot_count
FROM "2023_crop_data"
GROUP BY "Crop", "Site"
ORDER BY mean_survival DESC
LIMIT 1

WITH site_pea_data AS (
  SELECT "Site", "Crop", AVG("Survival") AS avg_survival
  FROM "2023_crop_data"
  WHERE "Crop" IN ('black pea', 'green pea')
  GROUP BY "Site", "Crop"
),
site_counts AS (
  SELECT "Site"
  FROM site_pea_data
  GROUP BY "Site"
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT "Crop") = 2
),
survival_comparison AS (
  SELECT spd."Site",
         MAX(CASE WHEN spd."Crop" = 'black pea' THEN spd.avg_survival ELSE NULL END) AS black_pea_survival,
         MAX(CASE WHEN spd."Crop" = 'green pea' THEN spd.avg_survival ELSE NULL END) AS green_pea_survival
  FROM site_pea_data spd
  JOIN site_counts sc ON spd."Site" = sc."Site"
  GROUP BY spd."Site"
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_sites,
       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE black_pea_survival > green_pea_survival) AS black_pea_better_sites
FROM survival_comparison

SELECT "Site",
       AVG(CASE WHEN "Crop" = 'barley' THEN "Survival" END) AS barley_mean_survival,
       AVG(CASE WHEN "Crop" = 'green pea' THEN "Survival" END) AS green_pea_mean_survival
FROM "2023_crop_data"
WHERE "Site" IN ('Kiamo', 'Kibber', 'Tashigang')
GROUP BY "Site"
HAVING AVG(CASE WHEN "Crop" = 'barley' THEN "Survival" END) > AVG(CASE WHEN "Crop" = 'green pea' THEN "Survival" END)

SELECT avg("Survival") AS mean_survival_rate, count(*) AS plot_count
FROM "2023_crop_data"
WHERE "Crop" = 'black pea' AND "Site" = 'Kiamo'

SELECT "Crop", 
       round(avg("Survival")::numeric, 3) AS mean_survival, 
       round(stddev_samp("Survival")::numeric, 3) AS sd_survival, 
       count(*) AS plot_count
FROM "2023_crop_data"
WHERE "Survival" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY "Crop"

SELECT "Crop", "Site", AVG("Survival") AS mean_survival_rate, COUNT(*) AS plot_count
FROM "2023_crop_data"
GROUP BY "Crop", "Site"
ORDER BY "Crop", "Site"

SELECT COUNT(*) AS n_plots,
       ROUND(percentile_cont(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "Average_height_100")::numeric, 2) AS q25,
       ROUND(percentile_cont(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "Average_height_100")::numeric, 2) AS median,
       ROUND(percentile_cont(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "Average_height_100")::numeric, 2) AS q75
FROM "2023_crop_data"
WHERE "Crop" = 'black pea' AND "Average_height_100" IS NOT NULL

SELECT width_bucket(max_height, 0, 120, 5) AS height_bin,
       count(*) AS n_plots
FROM (
    SELECT GREATEST(
        COALESCE("Average_height_50", 0),
        COALESCE("Average_height_60", 0),
        COALESCE("Average_height_70", 0),
        COALESCE("Average_height_80", 0),
        COALESCE("Average_height_90", 0),
        COALESCE("Average_height_100", 0),
        COALESCE("Average_height_110", 0),
        COALESCE("Average_height_120", 0),
        COALESCE("Average_height_130", 0),
        COALESCE("Average_height_140", 0)
    ) AS max_height
    FROM "2023_crop_data"
    WHERE "Crop" = 'black pea'
) AS subquery
WHERE max_height IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY height_bin
ORDER BY height_bin

SELECT "Type", COUNT(*) AS accession_count
FROM "peapca_supplement_genome"
GROUP BY "Type"
ORDER BY accession_count DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT corr("Average_height_100", "Average_leaves_100") AS correlation,
       COUNT(*) AS plot_count
FROM "2023_crop_data"
WHERE "Crop" = 'black pea'
  AND "Average_height_100" IS NOT NULL
  AND "Average_leaves_100" IS NOT NULL

WITH ranked_plots AS (
  SELECT "Site", "Survival",
         percent_rank() OVER (ORDER BY "Survival") AS survival_percentile
  FROM "2023_crop_data"
  WHERE "Crop" = 'black pea'
)
SELECT "Site", "Survival", survival_percentile
FROM ranked_plots
ORDER BY "Site", "Survival"

WITH black_pea_data AS (
  SELECT "Site", 
         ("Average_height_50" + "Average_height_60" + "Average_height_70" + "Average_height_80" + 
          "Average_height_90" + "Average_height_100" + "Average_height_110" + "Average_height_120" + 
          "Average_height_130" + "Average_height_140") / 10.0 AS mean_height
  FROM "2023_crop_data"
  WHERE "Crop" = 'black pea'
),
stats AS (
  SELECT AVG(mean_height) AS overall_mean, 
         STDDEV_SAMP(mean_height) AS overall_stddev
  FROM black_pea_data
)
SELECT bpd."Site", 
       bpd.mean_height, 
       (bpd.mean_height - s.overall_mean) / s.overall_stddev AS z_score
FROM black_pea_data bpd, stats s

SELECT round(corr("Pea_n18_NC_066579"."col_5", "Pea_n18_NC_066580"."col_5")::numeric, 4) AS pearson_r,
       count(*) AS n_accession_pairs
FROM "Pea_n18_NC_066579"
JOIN "Pea_n18_NC_066580" ON "Pea_n18_NC_066579"."col_1" = "Pea_n18_NC_066580"."col_1"
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n_crop_plots FROM "2023_crop_data"
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_rows, COUNT(DISTINCT "Helper_ID") AS distinct_helper_ids FROM "2023_crop_data"

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "Site") AS distinct_sites,
       COUNT(DISTINCT "Crop") AS distinct_crops
FROM "2023_crop_data"
SELECT MIN("Survival") AS min_survival, MAX("Survival") AS max_survival FROM "2023_crop_data"

group_stats AS (

SELECT 
  round(a.mean_titre::numeric, 4) AS mean_titre_breakthrough,
  round(b.mean_titre::numeric, 4) AS mean_titre_no_breakthrough,
  round(((a.mean_titre - b.mean_titre) / sqrt(a.var_titre/a.n + b.var_titre/b.n))::numeric, 4) AS welch_t

WITH fatigue_data AS (
  SELECT "inf_public"."SUBJECT.ID.", "inf_public"."new_group", "inf_public"."fatigue"
  FROM "inf_public"
  JOIN "behavior_raw_public" ON "inf_public"."SUBJECT.ID." = "behavior_raw_public"."id"
  WHERE "inf_public"."infection_timing" = 'Breakthrough' AND "inf_public"."fatigue" IS NOT NULL
),
contingency_table AS (
  SELECT 
    "new_group",
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "fatigue" = TRUE) AS fatigue_yes,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "fatigue" = FALSE) AS fatigue_no
  FROM fatigue_data
  GROUP BY "new_group"
),
chi_square AS (
  SELECT 
    SUM(fatigue_yes) AS total_fatigue_yes,
    SUM(fatigue_no) AS total_fatigue_no,
    SUM(fatigue_yes + fatigue_no) AS total
  FROM contingency_table
),
expected_values AS (
  SELECT 
    "new_group",
    fatigue_yes,
    fatigue_no,
    (total_fatigue_yes::numeric * (fatigue_yes + fatigue_no) / total) AS expected_fatigue_yes,
    (total_fatigue_no::numeric * (fatigue_yes + fatigue_no) / total) AS expected_fatigue_no
  FROM contingency_table, chi_square
),
chi_square_statistic AS (
  SELECT 
    SUM(POWER(fatigue_yes - expected_fatigue_yes, 2) / expected_fatigue_yes +
        POWER(fatigue_no - expected_fatigue_no, 2) / expected_fatigue_no) AS chi_square
  FROM expected_values
)
SELECT chi_square FROM chi_square_statistic

WITH d AS (

),
obs AS (SELECT s, c, COUNT(*)::numeric AS o FROM d GROUP BY s, c),
grid AS (SELECT ss.s, cc.c FROM (SELECT DISTINCT s FROM d) ss
                          CROSS JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT c FROM d) cc),
cell AS (
  SELECT grid.s, grid.c, COALESCE(obs.o, 0) AS o
  FROM grid LEFT JOIN obs ON obs.s = grid.s AND obs.c = grid.c
),
rt AS (SELECT s, SUM(o) AS row_total FROM cell GROUP BY s),
ct AS (SELECT c, SUM(o) AS col_total FROM cell GROUP BY c),
gt AS (SELECT SUM(o) AS grand_total FROM cell)
SELECT ROUND(SUM(POWER(cell.o - rt.row_total * ct.col_total / gt.grand_total, 2)
                 / NULLIF(rt.row_total * ct.col_total / gt.grand_total, 0)), 4) AS chi_square
FROM cell
JOIN rt ON rt.s = cell.s
JOIN ct ON ct.c = cell.c
CROSS JOIN gt

WITH ranked_data AS (
  SELECT "sex", 
         "Perch height (cm)", 
         rank() OVER (ORDER BY "Perch height (cm)") AS rank
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "Perch height (cm)" IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
  m.rank_sum AS male_rank_sum,
  f.rank_sum AS female_rank_sum,
  m.n AS male_n,
  f.n AS female_n,
  (m.rank_sum - (m.n * (m.n + f.n + 1) / 2.0)) / sqrt(m.n * f.n * (m.n + f.n + 1) / 12.0) AS z_statistic
FROM (
  SELECT sum(rank) AS rank_sum, count(*) AS n
  FROM ranked_data
  WHERE "sex" = 'male'
) m,
(
  SELECT sum(rank) AS rank_sum, count(*) AS n
  FROM ranked_data
  WHERE "sex" = 'female'
) f

WITH ranked_data AS (
  SELECT "sex", "Perch height (cm)",
         rank() OVER (ORDER BY "Perch height (cm)") AS rank
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "age" = 'adult' AND "plot" = 'experimental' AND "Perch height (cm)" IS NOT NULL
),
grouped_data AS (
  SELECT "sex", count(*) AS n, sum(rank) AS rank_sum
  FROM ranked_data
  GROUP BY "sex"
),
stats AS (
  SELECT
    (SELECT n FROM grouped_data WHERE "sex" = 'male') AS n_male,
    (SELECT n FROM grouped_data WHERE "sex" = 'female') AS n_female,
    (SELECT rank_sum FROM grouped_data WHERE "sex" = 'male') AS rank_sum_male,
    (SELECT rank_sum FROM grouped_data WHERE "sex" = 'female') AS rank_sum_female
)
SELECT
  n_male,
  n_female,
  (rank_sum_male - n_male * (n_male + 1) / 2.0) AS U_male,
  (rank_sum_female - n_female * (n_female + 1) / 2.0) AS U_female,
  (U_male - n_male * n_female / 2.0) / sqrt(n_male * n_female * (n_male + n_female + 1) / 12.0) AS z
FROM stats

WITH d AS (

),
obs AS (SELECT "sex" AS s, "Vegetation density" AS vd, COUNT(*)::numeric AS o FROM d GROUP BY "sex", "Vegetation density"),
grid AS (SELECT gs.s, vds.vd FROM (SELECT DISTINCT "sex" AS s FROM d) gs
                          CROSS JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT "Vegetation density" AS vd FROM d) vds),
cell AS (
  SELECT grid.s, grid.vd, COALESCE(obs.o, 0) AS o
  FROM grid LEFT JOIN obs ON obs.s = grid.s AND obs.vd = grid.vd
),
rt AS (SELECT s, SUM(o) AS row_total FROM cell GROUP BY s),
ct AS (SELECT vd, SUM(o) AS col_total FROM cell GROUP BY vd),
gt AS (SELECT SUM(o) AS grand_total FROM cell)
SELECT ROUND(SUM(power(cell.o - rt.row_total * ct.col_total / gt.grand_total, 2)
                 / NULLIF(rt.row_total * ct.col_total / gt.grand_total, 0)), 4) AS chi_square
FROM cell
JOIN rt ON rt.s = cell.s
JOIN ct ON ct.vd = cell.vd
CROSS JOIN gt

WITH d AS (
  SELECT "sex", "Vegetation type"
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "age" = 'subadult' AND "plot" = 'experimental' AND "sex" IS NOT NULL AND "Vegetation type" IS NOT NULL
),
obs AS (SELECT "sex" AS s, "Vegetation type" AS v, COUNT(*)::numeric AS o FROM d GROUP BY "sex", "Vegetation type"),
grid AS (SELECT gs.s, vs.v FROM (SELECT DISTINCT s FROM obs) gs
                          CROSS JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT v FROM obs) vs),
cell AS (
  SELECT grid.s, grid.v, COALESCE(obs.o, 0) AS o
  FROM grid LEFT JOIN obs ON obs.s = grid.s AND obs.v = grid.v
),
rt AS (SELECT s, SUM(o) AS row_total FROM cell GROUP BY s),
ct AS (SELECT v, SUM(o) AS col_total FROM cell GROUP BY v),
gt AS (SELECT SUM(o) AS grand_total FROM cell)
SELECT ROUND(SUM(POWER(cell.o - rt.row_total * ct.col_total / gt.grand_total, 2)
                 / NULLIF(rt.row_total * ct.col_total / gt.grand_total, 0)), 4) AS chi_square
FROM cell
JOIN rt ON rt.s = cell.s
JOIN ct ON ct.v = cell.v
CROSS JOIN gt

WITH ranks AS (
  SELECT "ID", "age", "Distance from nearest water (m)",
         rank() OVER (ORDER BY "Distance from nearest water (m)") AS rank
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "Distance from nearest water (m)" IS NOT NULL AND "plot" = 'used'
),
group_stats AS (
  SELECT "age",
         COUNT(*) AS n,
         SUM(rank) AS rank_sum
  FROM ranks
  GROUP BY "age"
),
overall_stats AS (
  SELECT SUM(n) AS N, SUM(rank_sum) AS R
  FROM group_stats
),
mann_whitney AS (
  SELECT g."age", g.n, g.rank_sum,
         (g.rank_sum - g.n * (g.n + 1) / 2.0) AS U
  FROM group_stats g
),
z_score AS (
  SELECT mw1."age" AS age1, mw2."age" AS age2,
         mw1.U AS U1, mw2.U AS U2,
         (mw1.U - mw2.U) / sqrt((mw1.n * mw2.n * (mw1.n + mw2.n + 1)) / 12.0) AS z
  FROM mann_whitney mw1
  JOIN mann_whitney mw2 ON mw1."age" < mw2."age"
)
SELECT age1, age2, U1, U2, z
FROM z_score

SELECT "sex", "age", 
       percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "Perch height (cm)") AS median_perch_height
FROM "Sheet2"
WHERE "plot" = 'used' AND "Perch height (cm)" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY "sex", "age"
ORDER BY "age", "sex"

WITH stats AS (
  SELECT "age", 
         avg("Tree height (cm)") AS mean_tree_height, 
         var_samp("Tree height (cm)") AS var_tree_height, 
         count(*) AS n
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "Tree height (cm)" IS NOT NULL AND "plot" = 'used'
  GROUP BY "age"
)
SELECT round((max(mean_tree_height) FILTER (WHERE "age" = 'adult'))::numeric, 3) AS mean_tree_height_adult,
       round((max(mean_tree_height) FILTER (WHERE "age" = 'subadult'))::numeric, 3) AS mean_tree_height_subadult,
       round((((max(mean_tree_height) FILTER (WHERE "age" = 'adult')) - (max(mean_tree_height) FILTER (WHERE "age" = 'subadult')))
              / sqrt(sum((n - 1) * var_tree_height) / (sum(n) - 2)))::numeric, 3) AS cohen_d,
       round(((max(mean_tree_height) FILTER (WHERE "age" = 'adult') - max(mean_tree_height) FILTER (WHERE "age" = 'subadult'))
              / sqrt((max(var_tree_height) FILTER (WHERE "age" = 'adult') / max(n) FILTER (WHERE "age" = 'adult')) 
                     + (max(var_tree_height) FILTER (WHERE "age" = 'subadult') / max(n) FILTER (WHERE "age" = 'subadult'))))::numeric, 3) AS welch_t
FROM stats

SELECT "sex",
       percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "Light intensity (Lux)") AS median_light_intensity,
       AVG("Light intensity (Lux)") AS mean_light_intensity
FROM "Sheet2"
WHERE "age" = 'adult' AND "plot" = 'experimental'
GROUP BY "sex"
ORDER BY "sex"

WITH rock_stats AS (
  SELECT "sex", 
         percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "Rock height (cm)") AS median_rock_height,
         var_samp("Rock height (cm)") AS variance,
         count(*) AS count
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "age" = 'subadult' AND "plot" = 'experimental' AND "Rock height (cm)" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY "sex"
)
SELECT round((max(median_rock_height) FILTER (WHERE "sex" = 'female'))::numeric, 3) AS median_rock_height_female,
       round((max(median_rock_height) FILTER (WHERE "sex" = 'male'))::numeric, 3) AS median_rock_height_male,
       round((((max(median_rock_height) FILTER (WHERE "sex" = 'female')) - (max(median_rock_height) FILTER (WHERE "sex" = 'male')))
              / sqrt(sum((count - 1) * variance) / (sum(count) - 2)))::numeric, 3) AS cohen_d
FROM rock_stats

SELECT 
    "Vegetation type",
    COUNT(CASE WHEN "plot" = 'experimental' THEN 1 END) AS used_count,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN "plot" = 'control' THEN 1 END) AS available_count,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN "plot" = 'experimental' THEN 1 END)::double precision / NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN "plot" = 'control' THEN 1 END), 0) AS use_vs_availability_ratio
FROM 
    "Sheet2"
WHERE 
    "sex" = 'male' AND "age" = 'subadult'
GROUP BY 
    "Vegetation type"
ORDER BY 
    "Vegetation type"

SELECT 
  "Vegetation density",
  COUNT(CASE WHEN "plot" = 'experimental' THEN 1 END) AS used_count,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN "plot" = 'control' THEN 1 END) AS available_count,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN "plot" = 'experimental' THEN 1 END)::double precision / 
  NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN "plot" = 'control' THEN 1 END), 0) AS use_vs_availability_ratio
FROM 
  "Sheet2"
WHERE 
  "sex" = 'male' AND "age" = 'adult'
GROUP BY 
  "Vegetation density"
ORDER BY 
  "Vegetation density"

WITH all_plots AS (
  SELECT corr("Rock height (cm)", "Rock size (cm)") AS pearson_r_all,
         count(*) AS n_all
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "Rock height (cm)" IS NOT NULL AND "Rock size (cm)" IS NOT NULL
),
used_plots AS (
  SELECT corr("Rock height (cm)", "Rock size (cm)") AS pearson_r_used,
         count(*) AS n_used
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "Rock height (cm)" IS NOT NULL AND "Rock size (cm)" IS NOT NULL AND "plot" = 'experimental'
)
SELECT all_plots.pearson_r_all, all_plots.n_all, used_plots.pearson_r_used, used_plots.n_used
FROM all_plots CROSS JOIN used_plots

SELECT regr_slope("Perch height (cm)", "Tree height (cm)") AS slope,
       regr_intercept("Perch height (cm)", "Tree height (cm)") AS intercept,
       regr_r2("Perch height (cm)", "Tree height (cm)") AS r_squared,
       corr("Perch height (cm)", "Tree height (cm)") AS pearson_r
FROM "Sheet2"
WHERE "Perch height (cm)" IS NOT NULL AND "Tree height (cm)" IS NOT NULL

WITH used_plots AS (
  SELECT "Tree height (cm)" AS tree_height
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "plot" = 'experimental' AND "Tree height (cm)" IS NOT NULL
),
random_plots AS (
  SELECT "Tree height (cm)" AS tree_height
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "plot" = 'control' AND "Tree height (cm)" IS NOT NULL
),
used_stats AS (
  SELECT avg(tree_height) AS mean_used, stddev_samp(tree_height) AS sd_used, count(tree_height) AS n_used
  FROM used_plots
),
random_stats AS (
  SELECT avg(tree_height) AS mean_random, stddev_samp(tree_height) AS sd_random, count(tree_height) AS n_random
  FROM random_plots
)
SELECT round((used_stats.mean_used - random_stats.mean_random) / 
             sqrt(((used_stats.n_used - 1) * used_stats.sd_used * used_stats.sd_used + 
                   (random_stats.n_random - 1) * random_stats.sd_random * random_stats.sd_random) / 
                  (used_stats.n_used + random_stats.n_random - 2)), 3) AS cohen_d,
       round(used_stats.mean_used, 2) AS mean_tree_height_used,
       round(random_stats.mean_random, 2) AS mean_tree_height_random
FROM used_stats, random_stats

WITH juvenile_counts AS (
  SELECT 'juvenile' AS life_stage, 'strongyle' AS parasite, COUNT(*) AS record_count FROM "strong_df"
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'juvenile', 'fluke', COUNT(*) FROM "fluke_df"
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'juvenile', 'ecg', COUNT(*) FROM "ecg_df"
),
adult_counts AS (
  SELECT 'adult' AS life_stage, 'strongyle' AS parasite, COUNT(*) AS record_count FROM "adult_strong_df"
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'adult', 'fluke', COUNT(*) FROM "adult_fluke_df"
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'adult', 'ecg', COUNT(*) FROM "adult_ecg_df"
)
SELECT * FROM juvenile_counts
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM adult_counts

WITH maternal_lines AS (
  SELECT "MumCode", avg("lEPG") AS mean_burden, count(*) AS sample_size
  FROM "strong_df"
  GROUP BY "MumCode"
)
SELECT "MumCode", mean_burden, sample_size,
       rank() OVER (ORDER BY mean_burden DESC) AS burden_rank
FROM maternal_lines
ORDER BY burden_rank
LIMIT 5

WITH yearly_survival AS (
  SELECT "Year",
         AVG("Survived.mod") AS yearly_survival_rate,
         COUNT(*) AS sample_size
  FROM "strong_df"
  GROUP BY "Year"
)
SELECT "Year",
       yearly_survival_rate,
       sample_size,
       AVG(yearly_survival_rate) OVER (ORDER BY "Year" ROWS BETWEEN 1 PRECEDING AND 1 FOLLOWING) AS moving_avg_3yr
FROM yearly_survival
ORDER BY "Year"

    "adult_strong_df"

SELECT 
    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "Name") FROM "strong_df") +
    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "Name") FROM "fluke_df") +
    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "Name") FROM "ecg_df") +
    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "Name") FROM "adult_fluke_df") +
    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "Name") FROM "adult_ecg_df") AS distinct_deer_count

WITH strong_fluke AS (
  SELECT s."Name", s."Year", s."Season", s."lEPG" AS strong_lEPG, f."lEPG" AS fluke_lEPG
  FROM "strong_df" s
  JOIN "fluke_df" f ON s."Name" = f."Name" AND s."Year" = f."Year" AND s."Season" = f."Season"
),
strong_ecg AS (
  SELECT s."Name", s."Year", s."Season", s."lEPG" AS strong_lEPG, e."lEPG" AS ecg_lEPG
  FROM "strong_df" s
  JOIN "ecg_df" e ON s."Name" = e."Name" AND s."Year" = e."Year" AND s."Season" = e."Season"
),
fluke_ecg AS (
  SELECT f."Name", f."Year", f."Season", f."lEPG" AS fluke_lEPG, e."lEPG" AS ecg_lEPG
  FROM "fluke_df" f
  JOIN "ecg_df" e ON f."Name" = e."Name" AND f."Year" = e."Year" AND f."Season" = e."Season"
)
SELECT 'strong_fluke' AS pair, round(corr(strong_lEPG, fluke_lEPG)::numeric, 4) AS pearson_r, count(*) AS n_samples
FROM strong_fluke
UNION ALL
SELECT 'strong_ecg' AS pair, round(corr(strong_lEPG, ecg_lEPG)::numeric, 4) AS pearson_r, count(*) AS n_samples
FROM strong_ecg
UNION ALL
SELECT 'fluke_ecg' AS pair, round(corr(fluke_lEPG, ecg_lEPG)::numeric, 4) AS pearson_r, count(*) AS n_samples
FROM fluke_ecg

SELECT min("Year") AS earliest_sampling_year, max("Year") AS latest_sampling_year FROM "fluke_df"
